description: User types 'camden' into the destination search field to filter results
frame_description: The user enters text into the search bar, triggering a dropdown of location suggestions.

description: User selects 'Camden, London, England' from the search suggestions dropdown
frame_description: The search field updates to the selected location, initiating a new search.

description: The page displays loading placeholders while fetching updated hostel results for Camden
frame_description: Skeleton screens are visible as the content area refreshes with new data.

description: User reviews the updated search results and map for hostels in the Camden area
frame_description: The user pauses to examine the newly loaded list of 4 properties and their locations on the map.

description: User scrolls down the list of hostel results to view more options
frame_description: The list of hostels (Palmers Lodge, Smart Camden Inn, Phoenix Hostel) moves upward as the user scrolls.
